reviews.comment:
Es un lugar muy tranquilo y relajante,  apartado de la ruta y con mucha area verde.

(Translated by Google)
It is a very quiet and relaxing place, away from the main road and with plenty of green space.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBa2JXbk9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Con todo lo necesario para parar en la ruta. Surtidores de combustible bien atendidos, baños limpios con todo lo necesario, bar y kiosco surtido de productos. Y un camping con sombra para pasar un buen rato de esparcimiento, para continuar el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
With everything you need for a roadside stop: well-staffed gas pumps, clean restrooms with all the necessary amenities, a bar and a well-stocked kiosk, and a shaded campsite for a relaxing break before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncjlXdUxnEAE
